Off Calendar Jan-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY; AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS.
No appearances. Based on no appearance, the parties are deemed to have stipulated to the matter being decided by a Judge Pro Tem. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to compel is granted. Sanctions of $340.00 are awarded against Defendants. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/JPT) Judge Pro Tem: Elizabeth Riles; Not reported
